title: The Australian wool market has seen strong growth solidified this week

summary: The Australian national wool market rebounded this week with strong growth after declines over the previous two weeks.

title: Winter of surprises keeps on delivering
description_clean: A changeable weather pattern is set to continue, with more rain, shifting winds and another large low possible before July ends. The post Winter of surprises keeps on delivering appeared first on Farmers Weekly .

title: Kaimanawa horse charities raising funds to stop cull
description_clean: A group of 15 horses on ecologically sensitive land near Waiouru may be culled, if $50,000 cannot be raised to cover the cost of mustering them.
summary: A group of 15 Kaimanawa horses on ecologically sensitive land near Waiouru may be culled unless charities raise $50,000 to cover the cost of mustering them.

title: Luxon and Modi announce a new strategic partnership
